name: construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects simultaneously, inefficient task allocation causes project delays. We convert construction plans into task lists and resource allocations instead of manual scheduling and task management tools.
features: task list generation from construction plans

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual scheduling and task management tools
must_have_features: task list generation from construction plans
